summary: TLS Global Events feature testing completed. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (10 via pytest + 6 manual due to rate limiting). Frontend: All UI features verified. TLS Events Admin page loads, creates events with recurrence/audience scoping. Calendar shows TLS events with purple styling and read-only modal.
critical_code_review_comments: TLS Events CRUD endpoints properly protected with require_admin dependency
RRULE-based recurrence expansion works correctly with dateutil library
Audience scoping filters events by region/role for non-admin users
Combined calendar API correctly merges personal events with TLS events
TLS events in calendar are properly marked readonly=true
Frontend CalendarTab correctly displays TLS events with special purple styling
TLS event read-only modal shows appropriate badges and no action buttons
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_tls_events.py - Created comprehensive TLS events test suite
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI_Event_AGM_2026 during UI testing, will appear in events list
context_for_next_testing_agent: TLS Global Events Phase 1 complete. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/tls/events (admin only), POST /api/tls/events/{id}/cancel (with reason), GET /api/practice/calendar (combined with ?include_tls=true/false). Frontend: /admin/tls-events for admin management, Calendar tab shows TLS events with purple styling. TLS events are read-only for advocates. Rate limiting is 5 requests per minute on login endpoint.

Backend API Tests (TLS Events).POST /api/tls/events (basic): PASS - Creates basic TLS event with status=scheduled
Backend API Tests (TLS Events).POST /api/tls/events (recurrence): PASS - Creates recurring event with RRULE and series_id
Backend API Tests (TLS Events).POST /api/tls/events (regional): PASS - Creates event with audience scope=region

Backend API Tests (Combined Calendar).TLS events marked readonly: PASS - All TLS events have readonly=true
Backend API Tests (Combined Calendar).include_tls=false flag: PASS - Excludes TLS events when false

Frontend UI Tests (TLS Events Admin).Admin page loads: PASS - /admin/tls-events accessible via TLS Events card
Frontend UI Tests (TLS Events Admin).Form has all fields: PASS - Title, Description, Type, Priority, DateTime, Audience, Recurrence, Options
Frontend UI Tests (TLS Events Admin).Event creation: PASS - Creates event with success toast
Frontend UI Tests (TLS Events Admin).Action buttons visible: PASS - Edit, Cancel, Delete buttons on events

Frontend UI Tests (Calendar TLS Integrat.Modal shows badges: PASS - TLS Event, Mandatory, DEADLINE badges
Frontend UI Tests (Calendar TLS Integrat.No action buttons: PASS - Only Close button on TLS events

notes: Rate limiting on login endpoint (5 per minute) caused some test errors during rapid backend testing. Tests were re-run successfully after waiting for rate limit reset.
